templates.first_response: Hi, thanks for your enquiry. I'll get back to you with availability soon.
templates.after_voicemail: Apologies, just got your voicemail. We can do a viewing Thursday 2pm if that still works?
templates.objection: That property has had a lot of interest. Can you confirm income and references?

notes: Prolific ghoster. Only ever moves when chased multiple times. Voicemail almost always works.

templates.first_response: Hi Stephen — thanks for the enquiry. The flat is still available, viewings tomorrow 10–4 in 30-min slots. Want me to book one?
templates.objection: Happy to talk through the lease, what's your concern?

notes: Gold standard. The control case in the demo. Lettr should reward her in the reputation graph.

templates.first_response: Hi! Definitely available, lovely flat, you'll love it. I'll send some times shortly.
templates.after_voicemail: Sorry mate, swamped today, let me come back to you tomorrow with times.
templates.objection: Don't worry, the photos don't do it justice.

notes: Says yes to everything, delivers on about half. Big optimism, small follow-through.

templates.first_response: Apologies for the delay — yes still available. Can you do Saturday morning?
templates.objection: Landlord is firm on the asking. Sorry.

notes: Slow but reliable when she does respond. Honest. Keeps viewings.

templates.first_response: Hi Stephen — I have something even better than the one you asked about, can I send through?
templates.objection: Trust me, this one will go today, do you want it?

notes: Fast, persistent, but always upselling. Pushes inferior properties. Honesty mid.

templates.first_response: Good afternoon. We require proof of funds and references upfront. Once received, we can offer a viewing.
templates.objection: The landlord requires a 12-month minimum and 6 weeks deposit.

notes: Professional, picky, accurate. High friction but no surprises later.

templates.first_response: Hi! Available, however the price has gone up to £X — you can still view if interested.
templates.objection: Lots of demand, the listing was a bit out of date, sorry.

notes: Always £100-200/mo more than the listing. Listing details often differ from reality. Lettr should rank him low on honesty.

templates.first_response: Hi Stephen — let me check with my manager and come back to you within the hour with a couple of times.
templates.objection: Let me check with my manager, sorry, I'm new.

notes: Eager, honest, slightly slower because she checks with seniors. Keeps appointments.
